meta.title: Marketing — Multichannel Automation
meta.description: Build automated journeys, launch campaigns and engage customers across every channel with Solvefy's marketing platform.

hero.title: Boost your sales with <accent>intelligent messaging and high-scale communication.</accent>
hero.subtitle: Centralize your sends via WhatsApp, SMS, RCS and Voice on a single platform. Automate mass messages, reduce operational costs and strengthen your relationship with your customer wherever they are.

painCards.title: Marketing that <accent>sells on its own</accent> and shows exactly what <accent>works</accent>.

automation.title: Automation that saves your time.
automation.desc: Say goodbye to manual sends that don't scale. Build relationship cadences, nurture flows and complex journeys that run 24/7 automatically.

conversion.title: Unbeatable conversion rates.
conversion.desc: Stop being ignored. Reach your audience where they really are with native integrations for Official WhatsApp, SMS and RCS (rich messaging).

centralized.title: All your marketing in one place.
centralized.desc: Stop paying for dozens of disconnected tools. Centralize your base, track metrics in real time and gain predictability over what truly drives ROI.

easyIa.title: Meet <accent>EasyAI</accent>
easyIa.subtitle: Need help optimizing your business? Our native AI writes persuasive copy, suggests A/B tests and segments your base in seconds. Let technology work for your conversion while you focus on strategy.

pricing.title: Choose the <accent>right</accent> plan to grow.
pricing.subtitle: Billed in BRL, no FX swings and no fine print.
pricing.annualSave: Save up to 39% by going annual
pricing.footerNote: ⚠️ Important: Plan subscriptions don't include channel send credits. Broadcasts are billed by usage and can be purchased separately as standalone credits.

next.name: Next
next.desc: Perfect to start and structure your communication.
next.f6: WhatsApp, email, RCS, Voice and SMS
next.f7: Next-tier access to the Disparo Pro API

fast.name: Fast
fast.desc: Ideal for those who want to scale with organization and integration.
fast.f7: Fast-tier access to the Disparo Pro API

best.name: Best
best.desc: For operations that demand maximum performance and intelligence.
best.f4: Best-tier access to the Disparo Pro API

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.ideal: In today's digital marketing, depending on manual processes or fragmented data means losing money. With Solvefy Marketing, you orchestrate the whole customer journey through a robust, intuitive platform built for high-performance teams.
enterprise.footer: Attract, engage and convert. Centralize your digital strategy in a single automation platform focused on real results.
